notes: 0.9.13 is the audit-repair and creative-fidelity release. It reconciles all 79 tracked findings from two independent correctness audits: multi-window project authority and recovery, Flow execution ownership/cancellation/retry/cache correctness, portable Paper assets and synchronized multi-tab workspaces, exact managed-font and editor/export typography parity, durable Image histories and snapshots, Video comic/export lifecycle fixes, Source Library and settings durability, and provider-result integrity. Image now includes 173 professionally calibrated brushes across 22 collapsible sets, with pressure, tilt, rotation, texture, paint-loading and wet-media behavior tuned against rendered proofs. Wacom azimuth now follows the full physical stylus direction instead of compressing rotation by the pen's inclination. Windows packaging is NSIS (.exe); Linux is AppImage and .deb; macOS includes Intel and Apple Silicon builds; Android is available as a signed APK and on the Google Play Internal testing track as version code 15.
